overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage from a Western-themed video game showing a character in a brown coat and hat walking along a forest trail. The character encounters a horse-drawn carriage and continues toward a waterfall in a mountainous, overcast environment with dense pine forests.

scene_state.functional_zone: forest trail through mountain valley with pine trees

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt trail through the forested valley, heading toward distant mountains

entered.detail: muddy dirt path with grass edges winding through the valley
dense forest of tall evergreen pine trees covering the hillside
green grassy slope rising gently on the right side of the trail
large boulder and rock formation beside the trail
tall dead tree trunk with no leaves standing among the pines
distant rocky mountain peaks partially obscured by clouds

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a dirt trail through a wide mountain valley under overcast skies. Tall pine forests line the left side while grassy hillsides rise on the right. Rocky outcrops and a distinctive dead tree trunk are visible nearby as the trail leads toward distant mountains.

events.description: horse-drawn carriage with two horses enters from the right and passes ahead on the trail

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk along the trail as a horse-drawn carriage overtakes from the right

notable_agents.action: horse-drawn carriage traveling along the trail, moving ahead of the character

entered.detail: wooden wagon with two horses and a driver wearing dark clothing

segments.scene_description: As the character continues walking, a horse-drawn carriage enters from the right and passes ahead on the trail. The carriage moves along the dirt path before pulling ahead into the distance, while the surrounding forest and mountain scenery remains consistent.

scene_state.functional_zone: rocky trail approaching waterfall and river

events.description: trail becomes rocky and descends toward a waterfall cascading into a river pool

agents.ego_description: walking toward the waterfall, navigating over rocky terrain near the water's edge

entered.detail: waterfall cascading down layered rocky cliff into a pool below
greenish water pool at the base of the waterfall with rocky banks
steep layered rock formation with horizontal sedimentary strata

segments.scene_description: The character continues along the trail as the landscape transitions to a rocky area with a prominent waterfall ahead. The horse-drawn carriage disappears into the distance as the character approaches the cascading water and the green river pool at its base, with steep cliff faces lining the left side of the path.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement along a mountain trail that transitions from a wide valley into a rugged landscape featuring a waterfall. It begins with the character walking a dirt path under overcast skies, flanked by tall pine forests and grassy hillsides with rocky outcrops. As the character progresses, a horse-drawn carriage enters from the right and passes ahead, moving further into the distance along the consistent forest scenery. The scene then shifts as the trail leads into a rocky area, where the path narrows against steep cliff faces. Finally, the camera follows the character toward a cascading waterfall and the green river pool at its base.
